Environmental Protection.summary: Consistently supports climate action legislation and environmental protection measures.

Infrastructure Investment and Jobs Act with clean energy funding (Senate roll call vote 204, August 2021)

Reproductive Health Rights.summary: Strong supporter of abortion rights and access to reproductive healthcare.
voted_for: Women's Health Protection Act (Senate vote, February 2022)
Freedom to Travel for Health Care Act of 2022 (Co-sponsor, July 2022)

LGBTQ+ Rights.summary: Consistent supporter of LGBTQ+ equality legislation.
voted_for: Respect for Marriage Act (Senate roll call vote 373, November 2022)

Cannabis Policy.summary: Supports cannabis reform and banking access for cannabis businesses.

Progressive Taxation.summary: Supports closing tax loopholes and ensuring corporations pay fair share.
